_note: Synthetic vectors. The GS101 upstream snapshot ships no examples, so inputs were hand-built to exercise every channel in the upstream channel/type TLV (0x05/0x8e gas, 0x06/0x01 valve, 0x07/0x01 relay, 0x08/0x90 sensor life, 0xff/0x3f alarm). expected.data was produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js and re-shaping its output to the normalized vocabulary: state normal/abnormal -> air.gasAlarm false/true, valve/relay -> valveState/relayState extras, life_remain '3600s' -> sensorLifeRemaining 3600 (number, seconds), alarm 'sensor about to fail' -> sensorAlarm 'sensorAboutToFail'. Covers air.gasAlarm true and false plus two error inputs.

uplink.description: gas normal, valve open, relay close, sensor life 3600s (air.gasAlarm false)
gas abnormal with sensor about-to-fail alarm (air.gasAlarm true)
unrecognized channels yield no recognized data
